articles.title: Trump administration wants nuclear startups to use plutonium for their reactors
articles.description: The U.S. government is sitting on dozens of tons of weapons-grade plutonium. It's hoping startups can find a use for it.

articles.author: Rebecca Bellan

articles.title: SpaceX’s Starlink nabs American Airlines contract, another win for its IPO
articles.description: American Airlines said Tuesday it plans to install Starlink on more than 500 Airbus aircraft, the latest carrier win for IPO-bound SpaceX.

articles.title: OpenRouter more than doubles valuation to $1.3B in a year
